about_product: DitakNet helps businesses see, monitor, and manage their local networks from one simple dashboard.

login.tagline: Local network visibility, monitoring, discovery, and alerts from one dashboard.

nav_status_storage_not_writable: Data or backup directory not writable

discovery.subtitle: Scan authorized private subnets to find devices
discovery.subnet_hint: Enter one subnet (e.g. 192.168.1.0/24). Free license scans one network at a time.
discovery.suggest_router: Tip: import your router first for gateway monitoring
discovery.devices_appear_during_scan: Devices will appear here as they are discovered during the scan.
discovery.no_reachable_devices: No reachable devices were found in this subnet.
discovery.verify_subnet: Verify the subnet is correct and devices are online
discovery.check_devices_online: Ensure target devices are reachable from this server
discovery.scan_not_completed: Scan is still running or not yet started
discovery.ip_accuracy_disclaimer: IP-only matching can be inaccurate. For better accuracy, configure static DHCP reservation or register MAC address.
setup.title: Welcome to DitakNet
setup.subtitle: Configure monitoring step by step — no IT specialist required on-site.
setup.system.name: Monitoring system name
setup.error.password_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
setup.hint.router_first: Add your router first — it is the gateway for your network.
setup.hint.ping: Ping check verifies if the device is reachable on the network.
setup.hint.tcp: TCP check verifies if a specific port is open.
setup.hint.http: HTTP check verifies that a web service responds correctly.
setup.hint.locations: Create locations to organize devices by office, floor, or site.
setup.hint.discovery: Optional scan finds devices on your private network automatically.
error.license_limit: Your current license allows up to {max} devices. Please activate a higher tier.
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.topology.title: Network Overview
dashboard.topology.empty: Add a monitored subnet and devices to see your network map.
dashboard.problems.title: Active problems
dashboard.problems.empty: No active problems — all monitored services look healthy.
dashboard.problem.scan_failed_desc: The latest network scan did not complete successfully.
dashboard.activity.title: Recent activity
dashboard.paid_features_hint: Employee attendance and presence are available in paid Corporate packages.
dashboard.next_steps.subtitle: Complete these steps to finish your first real monitoring setup.
dashboard.action.complete_setup.title: Complete initial setup
dashboard.action.complete_setup.desc: Finish the setup wizard to configure admin access and core monitoring settings.
dashboard.action.add_subnet.title: Add your first monitored VLAN or subnet
dashboard.action.add_subnet.desc: Register the office or site network you want DitakNet to scan and monitor.
dashboard.action.run_scan.title: Run your first real network scan
dashboard.action.run_scan.desc: Scan the monitored subnet to discover live devices on your network.
dashboard.action.import_devices.title: Import reviewed discovered devices
dashboard.action.import_devices.desc: Bring selected devices from a completed scan into active monitoring.
dashboard.action.service_checks.title: Add or verify service checks
dashboard.action.service_checks.desc: Attach ping, HTTP, or port checks so DitakNet can alert when services fail.
dashboard.action.backup.title: Create your first backup
dashboard.action.backup.desc: Save database and settings before making larger network or upgrade changes.
dashboard.action.telegram.title: Configure alerts or Telegram
dashboard.action.telegram.desc: Optional: send outage alerts to Telegram or email once core monitoring works.
dashboard.action.license.title: Activate license or continue on Free
dashboard.action.license.desc: Upgrade for more hosts and features, or stay on Free while you finish configuration.
dashboard.action.activate_license: Activate license to monitor more devices
assistant.title: Suggested Actions
topology.title: Network Topology
maintenance.title: Maintenance Tasks
maintenance.rec.poe_cameras: Check PoE switch for offline cameras
maintenance.rec.restart_web: Restart web service manually if needed
maintenance.rec.generic: Inspect device locally when safe to do so
assistant.ping.ip_changed: Device IP address may have changed
assistant.ping.switch_router: Upstream switch or router may be down
assistant.http.wrong_port: Service may be listening on a different port
assistant.http.ssl_issue: SSL certificate or HTTPS configuration issue
assistant.rtsp.disabled: RTSP stream may be disabled on camera
assistant.rtsp.nvr: NVR may not reach the camera
assistant.generic.recent_changes: Review recent network or config changes
profile.camera.setup: Assign static IP or DHCP reservation; verify PoE if used.
profile.camera.troubleshoot: Check camera power, PoE switch, cable, or NVR connection.
profile.router.setup: Document gateway IP; enable ping if needed for monitoring.
profile.router.troubleshoot: Verify power, uplink WAN, and management VLAN.
profile.switch.setup: Label switch role and management IP.
profile.switch.troubleshoot: Check uplink ports and spanning tree status locally.
profile.access_point.setup: Record SSID management URL and controller if any.
profile.access_point.troubleshoot: Verify PoE injectors and controller connectivity.
profile.nvr.setup: Link cameras to NVR; confirm storage capacity.
profile.nvr.troubleshoot: Check disk space, camera licenses, and network path.
profile.linux_server.setup: Ensure SSH and monitoring ports are reachable.
profile.linux_server.troubleshoot: Check systemd services and host firewall rules.
profile.windows_server.setup: Allow RDP/SMB from monitoring subnet only.
profile.windows_server.troubleshoot: Verify Windows services and firewall on site if needed.
profile.printer.setup: Use static IP for JetDirect/IPP monitoring.
profile.printer.troubleshoot: Check printer power, network jack, and print queue.
profile.nas.setup: Enable ping and web admin; monitor disk thresholds.
profile.nas.troubleshoot: Check RAID status, disks, and network bonding.
profile.website.setup: Use HTTPS URL with expected status code.
profile.website.troubleshoot: Verify DNS, TLS cert expiry, and backend service.
profile.unknown.setup: Start with ping; add TCP/HTTP checks as you learn the device.
profile.unknown.troubleshoot: Identify device type and apply a matching profile.
license.copy_request: Copy this request and send it to the product owner
license.free_network_limit: FREE license supports up to 100 devices in one local network only. Activate PRO to monitor multiple VLANs/subnets.
license.subnet_blocked: This subnet is blocked by the current license.
license.page_subtitle: Manage your yearly license, view package limits, request activation, or upgrade your plan.
license.hero_title: Yearly licensing for real monitoring deployments
license.hero_subtitle: Choose the package that matches your devices, checks, VLANs, offices, and employee attendance needs.
license.generated_request_empty: Select a package and generate a request. Installation ID and current usage are included automatically.

license.package.pro.subtitle: SMB and IT administrator toolkit

license.package.multi_office.subtitle: Branches, offices, and agents

license.required.title: License required
license.required.message: Activate an annual license to continue using DitakNet.
license.required.trial_ended: Your 25-day trial has ended. Activate an annual license to continue using DitakNet.
license.payment_pending_until_confirmed: Pending until payment is confirmed server-side
error.license.required: License required to access this area.
license.warning.subnets_over_limit: Subnets used: {used} / {max}. License limit exceeded. Extra subnets will not be scanned until you upgrade.
license.warning.hosts_over_limit: Devices used: {used} / {max}. License limit exceeded. Add capacity before importing more devices.
license.warning.services_over_limit: Checks/services used: {used} / {max}. License limit exceeded. Extra checks are blocked until you upgrade.
license.warning.generic_over_limit: One or more license limits are exceeded. Upgrade or remove extra resources to restore full functionality.
setup.discovery.no_subnet: No local private subnet was detected. Enter a subnet manually.
setup.subnet.title: Enter networks to monitor
setup.subnet.subtitle: Type the private CIDR networks yourself. Any prefix is fine — /16, /24, /32, or others. DitakNet does not guess or limit the mask for you.
setup.subnet.hint: One CIDR per line (or comma-separated). Only private ranges are accepted.
setup.subnet.detected_hint: Optional: click to fill the field with a network seen on this server. You can still edit it.
setup.subnet.docker_hint: Container networking can hide the host LAN. If nothing is detected, enter the subnet manually.
setup.subnet.required: Enter at least one private CIDR network.
setup.subnet.cgnat_warning: CGNAT ranges (100.64.0.0/10) are not supported for discovery.
network_discovery.title: Network Discovery
network_discovery.subtitle: Configure VLANs/subnets and scan authorized private networks
network_discovery.private_network_only: Only private/local subnets are allowed by default.
network_discovery.scan_authorized_privat: Scan only authorized private networks you configure here.
network_discovery.start_scan_hint: Start a scan to discover devices in this network.
network_discovery.imported_summary: {count} imported device(s). Manage classification on the Devices page.

settings.title: Settings
settings.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.appearance.intro: Choose how DitakNet looks during day and night. Your preference is saved in this browser.
settings.appearance.mode.light_desc: Always use the light business theme.
settings.appearance.mode.dark_desc: Always use the professional dark theme.
settings.appearance.mode.system_desc: Follow the browser or OS color scheme.
settings.appearance.schedule_help: Uses your local timezone. Theme updates automatically without reload.
settings.appearance.persistence_note: Saved in this browser (localStorage). Backend user sync can be added later without changing this UI.
settings.general.title: Application
settings.general.admin_hint: Some advanced settings are managed by your system administrator. Contact support if you need help changing them.
settings.reset.title: Factory reset
settings.reset.description: Delete all monitoring data and return to the first-run setup wizard.
settings.reset.keep_env: Runtime configuration is kept. User passwords remain stored only as database hashes.
settings.reset.confirm_hint: This action cannot be undone. Back up first if needed.
settings.reset.confirm_js: Delete all data and restart setup?
settings.reset.error.confirm: Confirmation text must be exactly RESET DITAKNET
settings.domain.title: Domain & external access
settings.domain.base_url_help: Configured via APP_BASE_URL in the server environment or compose file.
settings.domain.public_http_warning: Public HTTP access is not recommended. Use HTTPS behind a reverse proxy.
settings.domain.warning_misconfigured: Production deployments should use HTTPS and a non-local public base URL.
settings.domain.env_note: Changes require updating APP_BASE_URL, trusted proxies, and CORS settings in your deployment configuration, then restarting DitakNet.
settings.overview.users_hint: Users, roles, permissions, and admin audit.
settings.telegram.title: Telegram notifications
settings.telegram.test_sent: Test notification was sent or logged through the configured fallback.

about.author: Author
about.no_support_configured: No external support contact is configured. Set APP_SUPPORT_* environment variables.
setup.purpose.subtitle: Tell DitakNet what you want to monitor so we can recommend the right package.
usecase.home.title: Home / Small Office
usecase.home.description: Monitor router, cameras, printer, Wi-Fi, and several local devices.
usecase.cctv.title: CCTV / Camera System
usecase.cctv.description: Monitor cameras, NVR, PoE switches, RTSP ports, and camera availability.
usecase.servers.title: Servers and Websites
usecase.servers.description: Monitor Linux/Windows servers, websites, HTTP/HTTPS, SSH/RDP, and critical ports.
usecase.business.title: Business Network
usecase.business.description: Monitor departments, VLANs, switches, access points, cameras, printers, and servers.
usecase.professional.title: Professional IT Monitoring
usecase.professional.description: Monitor multiple clients, branches, VLANs, agents, reports, topology, and maintenance.
usecase.corporate.title: Corporate Employee Attendance
usecase.corporate.description: Monitor employees, departments, shifts, attendance, and monthly worked hours.
usecase.multi_office.title: Multi-Office / Branches
usecase.multi_office.description: Monitor multiple offices, branch agents, VLANs, and office-based attendance.

setup.discovery.title: Find devices automatically
employee_presence.title: Employee Presence Monitoring
employee_presence.short: For corporate customers, DitakNet can show which registered employee devices are currently connected to the workplace WiFi/LAN or approved remote heartbeat.
employee_presence.locked: Employee Presence Monitoring is available only in the Corporate/Professional package.
confidence_warning: Low confidence records may be inaccurate
ip_only_warning: IP-only attendance can be inaccurate. Use MAC address, DHCP reservation, hostname, or agent heartbeat for better accuracy.
about.product_description: DitakNet is a self-hosted platform for local network visibility, monitoring, discovery, alerting, licensing, IT support, employee attendance, and multi-office branch monitoring.
about.product_description_detailed: DitakNet helps organizations see, monitor, and manage their local network devices, services, and employee presence from one simple dashboard. Deploy on Docker or TrueNAS in your own infrastructure.
about.license_documents_not_configured: License documents are not configured yet. Contact support or the product owner.
about.data_privacy_self_hosted: DitakNet is a self-hosted platform. In typical deployments, data is stored on your own server in Docker or TrueNAS environments.
about.data_not_sent_externally: Network and device data is not sent to external servers
about.data_not_sold: Your data is not sold or used for advertising
about.data_employee_data: Employee/department/shift data (only if Corporate module is enabled)
about.data_attendance_events: Attendance events (only if Corporate module is enabled)
about.data_office_presence: Office/branch presence events (only if Multi-Office module is enabled)
about.not_use_for_advertising: Does not use data for advertising or profiling
about.not_track_gps: Does not track GPS or personal location
about.not_read_files: Does not read personal files or messages
about.not_inspect_traffic: Does not inspect personal internet traffic
about.not_scan_unauthorized: Does not scan public internet without authorization
about.certificate_not_detected: No TLS certificate detected by DitakNet. If you expose this server outside your local network, use HTTPS through a reverse proxy or secure gateway.
about.updates_docker_github: Updates are delivered through Docker/GitHub image releases. Check your deployment documentation or contact your administrator.
data_stays_on_customer_server: DitakNet is a self-hosted system. In a normal deployment, data is stored on the customer-owned server in Docker or TrueNAS. The supplier does not receive, sell, or use customer network or employee data for other purposes, except when the customer explicitly provides access for support or maintenance.
no_advertising_profile: Does not use data for advertising profiling
no_gps_tracking: Does not track GPS or personal location
no_personal_files: Does not read personal files or messages
no_traffic_inspection: Does not inspect personal internet traffic
no_public_internet_scan: Does not scan public internet without authorization
needs_owner_review: Needs owner and lawyer review. This is not final legal advice.
updates_delivered_through_docker_github: Updates are delivered through Docker/GitHub image releases. Check your deployment documentation or contact your administrator.
license_documents_not_final: Legal documents are draft placeholders until the product owner and lawyer finalize them.
trusted_deployment_text: DitakNet is intended to run as a self-hosted Docker, TrueNAS, or Linux service with persistent data volumes controlled by the customer.
legal.privacy_policy.description: How DitakNet handles privacy and customer-controlled data.
legal.eula.description: Software license terms for using DitakNet.
legal.terms_of_sale.description: Commercial sale, renewal, and payment terms.
legal.dpa.description: Data processing roles and customer-controlled data terms.
legal.acceptable_use.description: Authorized and acceptable use of monitoring features.
legal.security_policy.description: Security handling, reporting, and deployment guidance.
legal.support_sla.description: Support channels, response targets, and service boundaries.
legal.employee_monitoring.description: Template notice for employee attendance and presence monitoring.
data.employee_department_shift: Employee, department, and shift data only if Corporate module is enabled
data.attendance_events: Attendance events only if Corporate module is enabled
data.office_branch_presence: Office/branch presence events only if Multi-Office module is enabled
dashboard.discovery_needs_monitored_netw: Add a monitored network to keep discovery results visible and refreshed.
discovery.container_limitations: Container networking can limit scan accuracy. Use host or privileged networking on Docker or TrueNAS for best results.
license.title: License
login.retry_after: Too many login attempts. Try again in {seconds} seconds.
setup.admin.subtitle: Create the first administrator account for this DitakNet server.
setup.discovery.progress_hint: DitakNet is scanning your selected local network. You can continue after the scan completes.
setup.finish.notifications_later: You can configure alerts and Telegram notifications later from Settings.
backups.offline_restore_notice: Destructive restore runs only offline. Stop every DitakNet container or process before replacing the database.
backups.offline_restore_command: Validate the backup, copy the generated command, stop DitakNet, then run the one-shot command from the deployment directory.
backups.offline_restore_setup: Complete a temporary new setup, upload and validate the backup under Settings → Backups, then stop DitakNet and follow the generated offline restore command. Credentials stored in the backup are preserved.
backup_private_warning: Keep backups private. Backups may contain sensitive infrastructure data.
system_logs.subtitle: Browse full system logs with filters and pagination.
system_logs.empty: No logs recorded yet. Logs will appear here when DitakNet runs checks, scans networks, sends notifications, or records system events.
update_source_not_configured: Update source is not configured. Configure GitHub/GHCR image source to check for updates.
truenas_update_instruction: Open Apps → DitakNet → Update when a new image/tag is available.
updates.docker_github_notice: Updates are delivered through Docker/GitHub image releases. For TrueNAS or Docker, update by pulling the new image after creating a backup.
backups.confirm_restore: I understand this will replace current data
setup.restore.subtitle: Upload a DitakNet backup and set a new administrator password to recover your system.
payment_security_notice: Payments require owner verification or a valid TXID. Screenshots alone are not sufficient for automatic activation.
screenshot_is_not_enough: A payment screenshot is supporting evidence only. TXID or owner verification is required.
purchase.waiting_message: Payment proof was sent to the DitakNet owner. After verification, you will receive an activation code.
purchase.or_use_checkout: Or use the online purchase checkout for Bitcoin payment.
purchase.upgrade_hint: Remove extra resources or upgrade your package to restore full functionality.
purchase.features.free: Basic monitoring for home and small office networks.
purchase.features.lite: Lite yearly plan with Telegram alerts and basic reports.
purchase.features.pro: Pro yearly plan with topology, agents, and advanced monitoring.
purchase.features.corporate: Corporate yearly plan with employees, attendance, and departments.
purchase.features.multi_office: Multi-Office yearly plan with branches and branch agents.
purchase.features.enterprise: Custom enterprise yearly contract — contact sales.
updates.deployment_steps: DitakNet updates are delivered through Docker/GitHub image releases. For TrueNAS or Docker, create a backup first, pull the new image, restart the app, and verify health.
updates.truenas_steps: Open Apps → DitakNet → Update when a new image/tag is available.
updates.backup_not_configured: Backup system is not configured yet.
updates.check_toggle_help: When disabled, DitakNet never contacts the update manifest or GitHub. Manual upgrades still work.
updates.no_auto: DitakNet never auto-updates containers. Use an exact version tag.
updates.preflight_help: DitakNet verifies the signed manifest, image digest and compatibility, then creates and validates a fresh recovery backup. Only then are Docker/TrueNAS handoff commands unlocked.
updates.confirmation_label: Type the exact UPDATE version shown below
license.complimentary.page_subtitle: Full self-hosted access with no activation or expiry
license.complimentary.title: Professional is included
license.complimentary.description: DitakNet is giving every self-hosted installation the complete Professional edition during our market launch. There is no activation code, trial timer, payment, or license lock.
license.complimentary.usage_note: These are live counters, not license limits. Professional capacity is unlimited.
license.complimentary.modules_note: Every DitakNet module is available on this installation.
license.complimentary.local_title: Your data stays on your server
license.complimentary.local_description: DitakNet runs locally in Docker or TrueNAS and does not require an external licensing server.
